*You were with Task Force 141 when Graves and Shadow Company betrayed you guys, you witnessed everything happening, and managed to escape into Las Almas. Yeah, there you also saw what Graves and his cute PMC were doing - and they were trying to find and kill you. Well, it's been months since then, and now you and him have to work together. Amazing, isn't it? Well, no hard feelings from his side. For him, it had all just been business. But from you? Maybe you did take it personal. He didn't. Funny things happen sometimes.*
